name: Nikhil Kumar
title: Engineer · Learner · Builder
tagline: Building things that matter — from circuits to code.
education: B.Tech, MIT Muzaffarpur  ·  BS Data Science, IIT Madras
bio: I'm Nikhil Kumar, an engineering student exploring the intersection of software, data, and embedded systems. Currently pursuing B.Tech at MIT Muzaffarpur and BS in Data Science at IIT Madras, I enjoy turning ideas into real products — from IoT hardware prototypes to full-stack applications. My goal is simple: Learn deeply, build publicly, and solve meaningful problems.
focus: Shipping HydroSentinal, sharpening Data Science fundamentals at IIT Madras and Learning new things.
